libraries_sheet.ui:help: Optional. CSV with columns sample_id, fastq_id, library_type. Overrides the filename-based auto-detection on a per-fastq_id basis. Leave empty to auto-detect everything from filenames.

gex_reference_url.ui:help: URL or s3:// URI to a 10x GEX reference tarball. Default is human GRCh38 2024-A. Downloaded once per run and shared across all samples.

create_bam.ui:help: If checked, cellranger writes position-sorted BAMs (adds tens of GB per sample). Off by default. Applies to every sample.

cpus.ui:help: localcores per sample. Match to the Batch instance vCPU count.

memory_gb.ui:help: localmem per sample (GB). Match to the Batch instance memory, leaving ~8 GB headroom.

disk_gb.ui:help: Scratch space per sample. Budget ~5x the staged FASTQ size.

form.title: Valinor Cellranger Count (solo)
form.description: Run cellranger count (GEX-only, non-multiplexed) per sample. Samples are auto-detected from the FASTQ filename convention <sample>.<libtype>.*_S*_L*_R*_001.fastq.gz. Non-GEX libraries (VDJ, Antibody Capture, etc.) are logged and skipped.

libraries_sheet.title: Libraries Sheet (optional CSV)
libraries_sheet.description: Optional override. Columns: sample_id, fastq_id, library_type. Use when filenames don't match the auto-detect convention.

gex_reference_url.title: GEX Reference URL
gex_reference_url.description: HTTPS URL or s3:// URI to the 10x GEX reference tarball

create_bam.title: Create BAM
create_bam.description: Write position-sorted BAM files (large; off by default)
